visuals.title: KNN Prediction Process Flowchart
visuals.description: Visual diagram for KNN Prediction Process Flowchart
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">K-Nearest Neighbor Learning</text>
  
  <!-- Training Data Points -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="8" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="120" cy="130" r="8" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="140" cy="90" r="8" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="160" cy="120" r="8" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="180" cy="100" r="8" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="200" cy="140" r="8" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- New Data Point -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="110" r="10" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Distance Lines -->
  <line x1="150" y1="110" x2="120" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="150" y1="110" x2="140" y2="90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="150" y1="110" x2="160" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- K Value Box -->
  <rect x="300" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    K = 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Classification Result -->
  <rect x="300" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#4CAF50" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Class: Green
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="80" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Training Data
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    New Point
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Parameter
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="350" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Prediction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
